health.description: Physical condition. At 0 the character is dead or incapacitated.

stamina.description: Physical energy for movement, work, running, resisting danger and late-night activity.

focus.description: Willingness and mental capacity to talk, think and engage deeply.

stress.description: Pressure and emotional load. High stress reduces focus and openness.

fear.description: Perceived danger. High fear changes routines and makes NPCs guarded.

interest.description: Motivation to continue talking or helping.

suspicionTowardPlayer.description: How suspicious the NPC is of the player.

focusBehaviours.behaviour: NPC refuses to talk or ends conversation.
NPC opens up and may share useful information.
NPC is deeply engaged and may risk sharing sensitive information.
